---
title: "Cool Images"
toc: TRUE
---
All the following images have been captured by or for me.

## Dogs
::: {layout-ncol=2}
![These are my Dogs](dogs.jpeg)

![Very Cute pups](dogs2.jpeg)

![This guy's name is Moon](moon.jpeg)

![And this gal is Maeve](maeve.jpeg)
:::

## Professional

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![LMSA 2025](LMSA_2025.jpeg)

![CCCC 2025](CCCC_poster.jpg)

![1st White Coat!](2023_white_coat.jpg)

![2nd White Coat!](white_coat_2.jpeg)
:::

## Research Images
These are a selection of images I've captured through microscopy techniques over the years. Samples shown are bacteria, mice, or IRB-approved, de-identified human tissue.

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![DNA Strands wrapping around a protein on AFM](AFM.png)

![Amyloid Fibrils on AFM](AFM_amyloid.jpg)

![Fluorescently-Labeled Mouse Heart](IF_heart.png)

![Lipid-Stained Mouse Heart](RedO.png)
:::

![Fluorescently-labeled immune cells from a bladder cancer biopsy](TLS.png)
